# Project Guidelines

## Skill Sources
- For any Supabase task, use `/Users/larryontruman/Desktop/Coding/5_Experiments/sippd/.github/skills/supabase/SKILL.md` as the primary source of workflow and security guidance.
- For any Nuxt task, use `/Users/larryontruman/Desktop/Coding/5_Experiments/sippd/.github/skills/nuxt-best-practices/SKILL.md` as the primary source of framework guidance.
- For any @nuxt/ui layout, component, form, theming, or navigation task, use `/Users/larryontruman/Desktop/Coding/5_Experiments/sippd/.github/skills/nuxt-ui/SKILL.md` first.
- For Vue component, reactivity, Composition API, or rendering-performance work, use `/Users/larryontruman/Desktop/Coding/5_Experiments/sippd/.github/skills/vue-best-practices/SKILL.md` first.

## Conventions
- Prefer the workspace skill files over generic framework defaults when they overlap.
- Keep custom agents aligned with these skill files rather than duplicating long framework guidance inside agent bodies.
- Frontend work should also follow `.github/instructions/nuxt-ui-brand.instructions.md` when it applies.
